description: Guitar-specific playability indexes for filtering usable shapes.

playability_tier.open_basic: Low-position open shapes suitable for beginner-friendly release curation.
playability_tier.practical_low_mid: Low/mid-position shapes with manageable fret span.
playability_tier.movable_closed: Movable or barre shapes useful for transposition and style control.
playability_tier.upper_position: Higher-position shapes that need clear arrangement purpose.
playability_tier.special_shape: Shapes that do not fit the main playability buckets.
